The Board module is a module for customers with keys to manage the power station. The onboard interface is a process for authorizing the power station to the service provider, which is also a prerequisite for subsequent processes.

The offboard interface is a process for revoking the authorization of the power station from the service provider. After the permission is revoked, the service provider will be unable to operate the power station and will not be able to receive the data of the power station.

It is important to note that the systemId used in the API interfaces in this chapter refers to the unique code representing the power station.
